1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: select 200-year storm-flood polygons within Kristiansand bbox (prefilter)

3.description: select 1km grid cells within Kristiansand bbox (prefilter)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect the 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: deduplicate grid cells (one row per grid_id)

6.description: count the number of unique grid cells intersecting storm-flood

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade AS omrade FROM stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, geom FROM statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);
